title: Just a Wrapper? How Much Do Scaffolds Matter?
summary: Just a Wrapper? How Much Do Scaffolds Matter?
whyItMatters: Authors: Hans Gundlach, Zachary Brown, Jayson Lynch, and Neil Thompson I am the shape the water takes. — ClawdBot, Moltbook TL;DR: ● Scaffolding — the software environment and contextual documents provided to an AI model at deployment — can yield significant performance improvements.
